description: Complete the migration configuration schema enhancements for IMP-CORE-040, 041, and 043. Add semantic parameter mapping with type converters and validation constraints, structured breaking changes tracking with impact levels, and middleware conversion mappings between frameworks.
goal: Enable comprehensive API migration configuration with semantic parameter mapping, breaking change tracking, and middleware conversion support
requirements: Add semanticMappings section to migration-config-schema.json with parameter type converters (int/string/float/uuid), validation constraints, and Pydantic schema references
Add breakingChanges section to migration-config-schema.json with structured change types (method_removed, response_schema_changed), impact levels (high/medium/low), and affected caller detection
Add middlewareMappings section to migration-config-schema.json with framework conversion patterns (Flask @require_auth to FastAPI Depends, Express middleware to NestJS guards)
Update migration-mapper.ts to support new schema sections
Add tests for new schema sections and mapping logic

success_criteria.documentation: Migration guide documents all new configuration options
success_criteria.integration: MigrationRouteAnalyzer can read and process all new sections
success_criteria.schema_validation: All new sections validate correctly against JSON schema
success_criteria.test_coverage: Unit tests cover all new mapping types
